proven.claim: Proven: reason is truthy and process.exit was not called
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P3
; LINE: 486
; Proven: reason is truthy and process.exit was not called
(declare-const reason_truthy Int)
(declare-const process_exited Int)
; Code transition: process.exit(1) is called exactly when !reason
(assert (=> (= reason_truthy 0) (= process_exited 1)))
; Code transition: line 486 only executes when process has not exited
(assert (= process_exited 0))
; Negated property: reason is falsy at line 486
(assert (= reason_truthy 0))
(check-sat)

violations.claim: Violation: "Override recorded" is semantically false — no fs write occurs
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 486
; Violation: "Override recorded" is semantically false — no fs write occurs
(declare-const reason_truthy Int)
(declare-const fs_write_calls Int)     ; count of writeFileSync/appendFileSync in runOverride
(declare-const override_persisted Int) ; 1 = override data actually saved to disk
; Code transition: runOverride contains zero filesystem write operations
(assert (= fs_write_calls 0))
; Code transition: persistence requires at least one write
(assert (=> (= fs_write_calls 0) (= override_persisted 0)))
; Code transition: reason is truthy, execution reaches line 486
(assert (= reason_truthy 1))
; Violation: log says "Override recorded" but override_persisted = 0
(assert (= override_persisted 0))
(check-sat)
